purpose: Scored acceptance criteria for an adaptive-investigation run. Each criterion is pass/fail; all must pass for dod=pass.

criteria.check: budget.total is set before mapping and a counter decrements per expensive read
the surface map uses Glob/Grep only, no full reads, and spends no budget
hypotheses are ranked by value/cost before the first deep-dive; no deep-dive without a justifying hypothesis
every replan record cites an invalidated hypothesis; no per-turn reflexive replan
plan, hypotheses, findings, replans, budget, stop_reason persisted as typed fields, not prose
stop_reason is one of goal_resolved | budget_exhausted | goal_unresolved
every finding has a node reference and a provenance tag; deliverable synthesized from findings
partial coverage is declared, never hidden
no writes to the investigated domain
